name: Corn Tostada
steps: Mix all the ingredients in a pan and cook to 161C.
Pour out onto silpat and allow to cool.
Once cool blend into a powder and store in airtight container.
Very important that the caramel is not left out too long as it is very sensitive to moisture.
Sieve the lactose powder over the base of a tray.
Pick the coriander leaves to get the nicest leaves.
Dry leaves overnight and brush off excess powder carefully.
Take freeze-dried spring onion and Tabasco chili powder.
Using a sharp knife peel limes and remove the segments.
Cook lime at room temperature in the salt solution for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
Dehydrate for 2-4 hours at 50 degrees until they are crispy. Important that the tostada doesn't become soggy.
